title: fragaria moschata subvar. calycina
intro: Fragaria moschata subvar. calycina, also known as the fragrant strawberry or sweet strawberry, is a type of edible plant belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities, which have been used to treat wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Fragaria moschata subvar. calycina include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and provide antioxidant properties, making it a popular choice in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
